brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 33, mirroring the capitulation signals seen during the August 2024 bottom, while 30-day BTC momentum stalls in a sideways regime. This 78.6% pattern match suggests the current anxiety is a liquidity reset rather than structural breakdown, with stablecoin growth quietly signaling sidelined capital waiting to be deployed. The market feels heavy, but historically, this level of fear has been the prelude to accumulation, not distribution.
brain_consensus.headline: Fear Grips the Market at the Brink

next_move.reasoning: Despite the 78.6% match to bottom_2024_aug Disbelief, current score sits in Anxiety (39-46) not Disbelief (55-62), and my 0% track record on direction calls suggests I've been forcing moves that don't exist—etf_flows at 100 and vix at 65 show institutional fear/hedging while mvrv_zscore collapsed to 24 indicates no valuation recovery, creating conflicting signals that likely resolve as chop rather than trend.
